supplies-not-annual-allowance.text: VR&E supplies are needs-based and not a flat annual allowance.

laptop-request-standard.text: VA should authorize necessary technology when the evidence satisfies the supply standard and the item is tied to the approved rehabilitation plan.

graduate-school-feasibility.text: VA may approve graduate training if required for employment in the rehabilitation goal or to overcome a serious employment handicap.

extension-beyond-48.text: An extension of rehabilitation services beyond 48 months requires a determination of a serious employment handicap.

retroactive-induction-eligibility.text: VA may approve retroactive induction if a veteran was eligible, entitled, and faced a serious employment handicap during the training period.

counselor-duty-to-assist.text: VA has a duty to assist the claimant by developing the evidence necessary to substantiate the claim for benefits.

discontinuance-cooperation-notice.text: VA must provide prior notice and a reasonable opportunity to comply before discontinuing a program for lack of cooperation.
